Vulnerabilities.Title: openssl: heap buffer overflow in certificate verification
Vulnerabilities.Description: A flaw in OpenSSL certificate verification allows a remote attacker to trigger a heap buffer overflow, potentially leading to remote code execution.

Vulnerabilities.Title: curl: information disclosure via cookie leakage on redirect
Vulnerabilities.Description: libcurl may leak cookies to an unintended host when following a redirect under specific configurations.

Misconfigurations.Title: Image user should not be 'root'
Misconfigurations.Description: Running containers as the root user is a security risk. Specify a non-root USER in the Dockerfile.
Misconfigurations.Message: Specify at least 1 USER command in Dockerfile with non-root user as argument
Misconfigurations.Resolution: Add a USER directive with a non-root user
